channel.title: Gabriele Bozzola on Gabriele Bozzola's Homepage
channel.description: Recent content in Gabriele Bozzola on Gabriele Bozzola's Homepage

item.title: Initial data for general relativistic simulations of multiple electrically charged black holes with linear and angular momenta
item.description: We apply the Bowen-York formalism to generate initial data for charged black-hole systems.

item.title: Universal relations for differentially rotating relativistic stars at the threshold to collapse
item.description: Turning points of sequences of rotating stars satisfy relations independent on the EOS and the degree of differential rotation.
